title: フェブラリーSの後に・敗れても空へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey delivers a strong performance in
the February Stakes. She may not have won, but
she's back in good form, leaving a lasting
impression on her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey and Hokko Tarumae exchange
praises, finally recognizing each other as equals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Copano Rickey desires a rematch,
Hokko Tarumae says she will depart on a
different path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Copano Rickey ponders Hokko Tarumae's
uncertain trajectory and the new flow of qi she
has begun to sense, she sets her sights on the
Kashiwa Kinen.
